# willUndoChange

**Type Property**

An identifier for the undo manager will undo change message.

## Declaration

```swift
static var willUndoChange: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UndoManager.WillUndoChangeMessage> { get }
```

## Discussion

Use this identifier with [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NotificationCenter]’s `addObserver(of:for:using:)` or `messages(of:for:bufferSize:)` methods to observe messages of type [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/UndoManager/WillUndoChangeMessage].

## Identifying undo manager messages

- **didUndoChange**: An identifier for the undo manager did undo change message.
- **willRedoChange**: An identifier for the undo manager will redo change message.
- **didRedoChange**: An identifier for the undo manager did redo change message.
- **checkpoint**: An identifier for the undo manager checkpoint message.
- **didOpenUndoGroup**: An identifier for the undo manager did open undo group message.
- **willCloseUndoGroup**: An identifier for the undo manager will close undo group message.
- **didCloseUndoGroup**: An identifier for the undo manager did close undo group message.
